title: Juztsys structure
description: this mod adds over 26 structures to the game with unuiqe part,loot table, advancements and other that match the biome,structure and the dimensions
body:
FOR BETTER EXPERIENCE DO NOT READ THE DESCRIPTION CAN CONTAIN SPOILER!

NEW
- 2 new advancements

1.related to illager fortress


2.from another game


26.jungle hut

- description another hut beside the swamp hut and have smth special inside
![hut](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ade7881d1ab51fe6725bd03bde7ef96e1e339a43_0.webp)
- inside the structure theres smth special
![hut](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9886077930826c9df1fe40b268a9265934c126b2_0.webp)

:INFO:

1.illager fortress

- descprition: this structure is the combination of village and nether fortress,this structure generated in the taiga and dark wood forest biome also have a good loot and dangerous enemy such as the illagers!
![Illager_fortress](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f634715a04a796dfd5f16373a8a9829c64ecb370.png)
- example of the smaller structure in illager fortress
![Illager_fortress](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5ba5b9226cec4e4e58641776eee3b4e7e36dce3.png) 2.mega end ship

- descprition: even though not part of the overworld this structure i included in the special structure list  this structure have more elytras than normal ship,and this structure also have some shulker to make it up for the rewards you getting. 
![Mega end ship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56753bb36d831b4bd3aa692929084971ef44cb23_0.webp)
example of the mega end ship from an angle
![Mega end ship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6802915c363009da143f2b3415fcbef013e84ff.png)
3.illusioner tower

- description: this is where the forgotten illusioner mob lies, this structure is the home to illusioner and the 2 ways to find illusioner in my mods
illusioner mob
![Illusioner tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0e2326937fd0ca8b11067124ed00b33d9c7d947.png)
- inside of a illusioner tower with the illusioner mob
![Illusioner tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/243709a093ea38c2e93fcd6d0d4264c4b9da89b3.png)
4.witch tower

- description: this is a witch hut but its a fancy version, this tower is where witch observe things and brew something, this structure in short is just an upgraded version of witch hut, with loot table, more witch and ect
![Witch tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ae60aae405fbccb401df35ec55370a324b3a15c.png)
- inside of witch tower
![Witch tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0f5ebc379d86d2d56e06b47edda3cf09aeb783a.png)
5.exposed dungeon desert

- description: one of the exposed dungon series, this structure is a more challenging version of desert pyramid with spawners and loots somewhere
![Desert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af8a1dcf4707f16edcedd80a76882a1ef810cf63.png)
- exposed dungeon desert treasure room
![Desert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5dc6653e821ae21fd03c79e048f4bf821c39d72a_0.webp)
6.exposed dungeon snowy

- description: the structure is another exposed dungeon series but its on snow biome and have diffrent enemy and loots.
![Snowy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f744b6550786d86f6f21d5b329aca0016ac10a1.png)
- inside of an exposed dungeon snowy
![Snowy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f07453c495718d8a14aa4b64a9ec02685119666_0.webp)
7.exposed dungeon plains

- description: this is also part of the exposed dungeon and its on plains biome and it have 2 version each with diffrent enemy and rewards
![Plains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c074424bb854b900a0db80a3dc8d452d6c173926.png)
- 2nd version of the exposed dungeon plains
![Plains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/639cd32053cb1db394be1d38e3a291d635b67422.png)
8.villager camp taiga

- description: this structure is where villager rest while traveling, this structure have 2 version, this one is the taiga version.
![Camp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc9b15ab0d892b6a72da681cac84107d4c3a8cf9.png)
- the camp from a diffrent angle
![Camp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9861b6634021b81e26ed6a84cf704d1c17d6560.png)
9.villager camp plains

- descpription: this is the plains version of the villager camp which basicly have the same loot, mob, and anything else as the taiga version
![Camp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af121473a3bc5b47c856f79602385bf5a1d7300e.png) 
- the inside of the plains villager camp
![Camp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f5e6736c8c66d4457185362f1e5942bbeb8c87e.png)
10.watchtower taiga

- description: this is just a watchtower in taiga biome, its basic you can observe things and loot what lefts
![Watchtower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ae0d83cb625fdfc7e9d180d608031101a9e5f71.png)
- the watchtower from a diffrent angle
![Watchtower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab17fc77fb0454b80e3b90b2936242dc88c0cef9.png)
11.watchtower plains

- description: this is the plains version of the watchtower and its very cool
![Watchtower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7944ba70feb24ceab48d4ada2f49dc6e915649d9.png)
- the inside of the watchtower
![Watchtower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64004bec5e2f2d39fe3378415dd3c54067468042.png)
12.graveyard

- description: this structure is new and this structure based off a grave yard and its have custom grave and loot tables.
![Graveyard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b3a4c0762efbcaa5326feecabb3334ee6709d22.png)
- the inside of one of the house in the graveyard
![Graveyard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/573677bdb67c41f77cceef084e2846966f7896a3_0.webp)
13.hot air ballon

- description: this structure is the only sky structure in my mod for now, this structure is high up in the sky and having a villager and sm loots to take
![Ballon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5ac61c3560f70edf75d4475cf724a8a101ed684_0.webp)
- blue variant of the hot air ballon
![Ballon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfe9d97bff0551a0e2a7f5fd93b6c700496f8fa9_0.webp)
14.stony_watchtower

- description: same as other watchtower but its made out of stone and a little smaller than its counterpart
![Watchtower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af3f840b12d164ffdba8e40368a8c50a94fbf3ce.png)
- the inside of stony watchtower
![Watchtower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd806a4b1ed5b0f90d189800998afc7aba7f31a4.png)
15.living_tree

- description: heavily inspired by living tree in terraria and it contain some starter loot to loots and underground sections
![Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fca479132479dee1c385e30ce49ffa82aa98f04.png)
- inside of one of living tree section
![Tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/239190cd29520c946148edf0e9ef64fb73d0b062_0.webp)

16.giant_beehive

- decription: this structure generate underground and its a bee themed hive with sections,loots,and bees!.
![giant beehive](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27c946689571b01df1bea20770db9cc9d11a68e5_0.webp)
- the structure from diffrent parts and an angry bee!!!.
![giant beehive](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2792d6df83e6adb7d0033e1b48be7628b8a1782f_0.webp)

                                           NEW
17.illager_campsite

- description: this structure is the early game challenging structure with camp and a watchtower ou need to figure out how to loot em.
![illager campsite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26b98fcb8987da6e12016bc21f8926a2a656d9b5_0.webp)
- the illager campsite from diffrent angle
![illager campsite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/414122244d1225a262aebcacaf859511b124985f_0.webp)
18.small villager boat

- description: yes i turned off the shader cause it bugged but this structure is a boat wich have a villager fishermen and some loot
![small villager boat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e68d8d8d86d63a51c6bdc0b5c2d2ffe1c1b15a1_0.webp)
- the boat from diffrent angle 
![small villager boat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d36e61497c8227d86d322672e5d41c9ef2a9ece_0.webp)
 
19.wandering trader camp

- description: this structure is on par with the villager camp but it was specially for wandering trader, also the loot based off wandering trader
![wander](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af3ed3bad014cfe5e42d7b1d97e387123ca5c898_0.webp)
- the wandering trader camp from high up angle
![wander](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed74237e92b2547d789466e03a6bd9160f27076c_0.webp)

20.well

- description: this is just a simple structure that based off desert well but its more detailedm while not serve any loot or challenge its just for the athmosphere
![well](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19f72f8e98989fbb23a4804ccfbd76eef0d4f687_0.webp)
- the inside of the well
![well](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfc4d01e3a9913bab2a6a80fade259dea1f068f9_0.webp)

21.piglin campsite

- description: this structure consist of 4 camps and some piglin which contain some loot to explore
![pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0cf0278fec574394b42ce289a599ea2929a7c70_0.webp)
- the campsite from a diffrent angle
![pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7428475cc0f5f56028ab99c0e3b6b1ef2f896448_0.webp)

22.crimson tower

- description: this tower stand in crimson forest home to piglin 
![crimSON](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8baae59b040f31eb121326f8916426008a709ae1_0.webp)
- the angle taken from inside the tower
![crimSON](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3783736be8c61c4d79b1487560970fc29bee0512_0.webp)

23.warped tower

- description: this tower stand in warped forest home to enderman
![warped](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63ebcf645879e91337bece0978092cc41250df7a_0.webp)
- the angle taken from inside the tower
![warped](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/123c244ee08cac1460a23a05347b18a717945d4b_0.webp)

24.mangrove temple

- description: this structture was inspired by desert temple and jungle temple but unlike both its in mangrove biome giving mangrove biome some reason to explore and also the way of getting the loot too is diffrent

![mang](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ccddbf8d24fbeaa4ffdf40c82fe8b9438929abe_0.webp)
- the temple from a high angle
![mang](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59457b456654c8a25568d564897c75badba4eb37_0.webp)

25.cherry gazebo

- description:this structure is in the cherry grove biome and it only serve as scenery structure that is beautiful

 ![cher](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42b48fda41e872ce504632a3608394fa524779cd_0.webp)
- cherry gazebo from an upper angle
![cher](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/636884053704841e14f49c19a88343b1c8abcc33_0.webp)

!ADVANCEMENTS!

new advancement tab and 8 new advancements to your world 

![ad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40d62645e75182ac8179b1f8461b77933d06d9fc.png)

the advancement can be obtain from entering structure or doing some task in the structure


this mod adds 25 new original vanilla like structure to mc with custom loot table and ect heres the list of the structure!!!

NOTE:
- this mod is uncompatible with previous version juztsys exposed dungeon 
- this mod will be backported to 1.20.1 but when the time is right
- you can suggest a structure via comment
- this mod will not be anything else beside structures and loot tables
